Golden hour in Rome feels like stepping into a painting by @iampcast 🌅✨Send this to your favorite traveling partner! 🫶

💡 Street lamps in Rome, introduced in the 19th century, cast a warm, golden glow that blends perfectly with sunset tones.

transcription.text: Tell them that I can't help it around, but I can cause I got L-L-L-Love L-L-L-Love
